meaning: n.同胞,同国人,同乡,乡下人,农民
examples: He determined to rescue his two countrymen.
He appealed to his countrymen not to lose heart.
If you act foolishly, people there might think that all of your countrymen are foolish as well.
Israel's former ambassador to the U.S. says his countrymen just noticed stakes are so high.
Iqbal Zafaruddin Ahmed, chief executive of privately held Associated Group, identifies with his suffering countrymen.
